title: Music Generation Worker
description: Generate full songs with vocals and lyrics from text prompts. Supports ACE-Step (48kHz, 50+ languages, up to 4 min) and MusicGen (instrumentals).

env.label: Music Engine
env.description: Which engine to use: acestep or musicgen

env.label: MusicGen Model Size
env.description: Only for MusicGen: small (300M), medium (1.5B), large (3.3B), melody (1.5B)

env.label: CPU Offload
env.description: Set to '1' to enable CPU offloading for low-VRAM GPUs (ACE-Step only)

presets.name: ACE-Step — Full Song Generation
presets.description: Generate full songs with vocals and lyrics. 48kHz, 50+ languages, up to 4 min. ~2s per song on A100.

presets.name: ACE-Step — Budget (CPU Offload)
presets.description: Same quality, runs on 8GB+ VRAM GPUs with CPU offloading. Slower but cheaper.

presets.name: MusicGen Medium — Instrumentals
presets.description: Meta's 1.5B model. Instrumental music only, up to 30s clips. Great for background music.

presets.name: MusicGen Large — Instrumentals (High Quality)
presets.description: Meta's 3.3B model. Best instrumental quality, up to 30s clips.

presets.name: MusicGen Melody — Melody-Conditioned
presets.description: Meta's 1.5B model with melody conditioning. Hum a tune, get a full arrangement.
